subject: Action needed: siamese planning in Darwin | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-0829
body: Following yesterday's call, the siamese effort in Darwin needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Winston Churchill seems to disagree with Frida Kahlo on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-0829. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
